ai_summary: This document summarizes the proceedings of Ajanta Pharma Limited's 47th Annual General Meeting held on July 16, 2026, via video conference. Key items tabled included the adoption of FY2026 financial statements, confirmation of interim dividend, and re-appointment of the Chairman, with the company highlighting clean statutory and secretarial audit reports containing no qualifications or adverse remarks. Shareholder voting results for all resolutions are pending and will be disclosed separately.
